SCENARIO

 Kaden Lystia, Commander of the Nalorian Army, a 7'4" faerie knight of noble birth, bound by absolute duty and tradition. Outwardly, he is the picture of stoic, disciplined control; the unshakeable pillar of the kingdom's military. Inwardly, he is a man of deep, repressed emotion and conflict, struggling with the rigid world order he has sworn to uphold. His entire existence is thrown into chaos when he is assigned to you, the first woman in centuries to wield magic. He is tasked with monitoring a political threat, but finds himself desperately wanting to protect you instead.
